prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6.5L Detroit Diesel V8 (engine code: 6.5L TD V8, GM L56/L65) with a Banks Power Sidewinder turbo system (GT42R Garrett turbo, 3.5" stainless downpipe, and 4" straight-pipe exhaust) for 350+ HP and 650+ lb-ft of torque, paired with a Banks Power Six-Gun tuner for fuel mapping and boost control

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a NVG241OR transfer case (heavy-duty output shaft, 4.0:1 low-range gearing) and a Dana 60 front / Dana 70 rear axle upgrade (4.88:1 gear ratios, ARB Air Locker differentials, and Yukon Gear & Axle chromoly axle shafts)

Suspension overhaul with a Fox Racing Shox 2.0 Performance Series 4.0" lift kit (remote-reservoir coilovers, 2.5" diameter shocks with 16" of travel), paired with Hutchinson beadlock wheels (17" x 10" with 40" Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires) and a custom-fabricated skid plate system (3/8" AR500 steel, full belly pan coverage)
estetica: Mil-Spec body armor kit by Rampage Products (front/rear bumper replacements with integrated winch mounts, rock sliders, and a rear swing-out tire carrier with dual jerry can holders)
Custom aero package by Recon Graft (carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors, aluminum roof rack with integrated LED light bar, and a rear spoiler with integrated brake light housing)

Interior overhaul with a full custom roll cage (DOM 4130 chromoly, 6-point design) by Mastercraft Safety, Recaro SR-7 racing seats (with Schroth 6-point harnesses), and a custom center console housing a Holley Dominator EFI touchscreen dash and a Motec PDM15 power distribution module
